prompt: Overhead flat-lay of a coffee bar spread. Multiple drinks in ceramic cups, a croissant, a small bowl of granola, scattered coffee beans on a light wood surface. Morning light, clean styling, bright and airy. Third-wave coffee aesthetic, editorial food photography.

Interior of a bright specialty coffee shop from the entrance looking in. Light wood counter, espresso machine, shelves of coffee bags, plants on the windowsill. Morning sunlight flooding in. No people. Inviting, warm, airy. Third-wave coffee aesthetic, editorial interior photography.

Close-up of freshly roasted coffee beans spread across a cooling tray, still steaming. Warm amber and brown tones. Soft focus on the edges, sharp in the center. Artisan, textural, aromatic feeling. Third-wave coffee aesthetic, editorial food photography.

Close-up of a barista's hands pouring steamed milk into a latte, creating a rosetta pattern. Morning sunlight streaming in from the left. Warm wood counter, ceramic cup. Shallow depth of field. Bright, inviting, not dark or moody. Third-wave coffee aesthetic, natural light photography.

Burlap sack of green coffee beans partially open on a wooden surface. A few loose beans scattered. Soft natural light from a window. Clean, minimal composition. Earthy, natural tones. Editorial food photography, bright and airy.

Double espresso in a small white ceramic cup on a saucer. Rich crema on top. Clean marble or light wood surface. Bright, high contrast, shot from slightly above. Third-wave coffee aesthetic, natural light photography.

Hand-poured V60 pour over in progress. Gooseneck kettle pouring water over coffee grounds. Glass carafe below catching the brew. Bright natural light, steam visible. Clean, precise, meditative. Third-wave coffee aesthetic.

Tall glass of cold brew coffee over ice on a sunny wooden table. Condensation on the glass. A straw, maybe a lemon slice or sprig of mint nearby. Bright, summery, refreshing. Natural light photography, warm tones.

Lavender latte in a ceramic mug — pale purple lilac color with latte art. A small sprig of dried lavender on the saucer. Soft, warm light. Pastel tones, inviting. Third-wave coffee aesthetic, natural light photography.

Three kraft paper bags of coffee beans lined up on a wooden shelf. Each with a simple label. One bag open showing whole beans. Clean, retail-display styling. Natural light, warm tones. Third-wave coffee aesthetic.

Wide shot of a barista at the pour over station. Multiple V60 drippers in a row. Morning light through a window. Clean counter, minimal equipment. Calm, ritualistic feeling. Third-wave coffee aesthetic, bright and airy.

Overhead shot of a finished latte with a leaf rosetta pattern. White cup on a dark saucer. Clean surface. Perfectly symmetrical art. Satisfying, precise. Third-wave coffee aesthetic, natural light photography.
Side angle of espresso extracting from a portafilter into a cup. Rich, honey-colored stream. Machine visible in background. Sharp focus on the stream, blurred background. Third-wave coffee aesthetic.
Close-up of a tap handle pouring cold brew into a glass. Nitrogen cascade visible in the dark liquid. Industrial-style tap system. Moody but clean. Third-wave coffee aesthetic.

Coffee beans in a roaster cooling tray, still steaming. Warm amber and brown tones. Industrial equipment, artisan process. Shot from above at an angle. Third-wave coffee aesthetic, warm natural light.

Beautifully styled lavender latte on a small marble tray with dried lavender flowers scattered around. Soft, warm light. Pastel purple tones. Instagram-worthy presentation. Third-wave coffee aesthetic.

The main service counter — clean light wood, espresso machine visible, pastry display case to one side. A barista behind the counter in a dark apron. Morning light, plants on the counter. Welcoming, well-organized. Bright and airy interior photography.

Two seats at a window counter with morning sunlight pouring in. A laptop open, a coffee cup, a small plant on the ledge. Peaceful, productive atmosphere. Bright and airy. Natural light interior photography.

A Probat coffee roaster in its own corner of the shop. Visible through a glass partition or in an open area. Industrial, warm copper and brass tones. A few burlap sacks nearby. Behind-the-scenes feel. Warm natural light.
Small outdoor patio with two or three bistro tables. Potted plants, a wooden fence, string lights unlit daytime. Dappled sunlight through a tree. Casual, urban, green. Natural light photography.

A long shared wooden table with mismatched chairs. A few people working on laptops or chatting in soft focus. Natural light, plants, a warm and communal atmosphere. Bright and airy interior photography.
A wall display of retail coffee bags organized on wooden shelves. Clean, curated look. Small handwritten origin cards next to each bag. Warm lighting, shop interior feel. Third-wave coffee aesthetic.

A small group of people at a cupping session around a table with many small cups. Focused, curious expressions. Natural light, coffee shop interior. Community gathering feel. Bright and warm editorial photography.

A man in his early 30s, East Asian features, wearing a simple dark t-shirt and apron. Standing next to a coffee roaster, arms crossed, relaxed smile. Natural light from a window. Warm, authentic, not corporate. Editorial portrait photography.
Lush green coffee farm on a hillside. Rows of coffee plants, blue sky. A farmer's hands picking red coffee cherries. Bright, vibrant, tropical. Warm natural tones. Editorial photography.
Coffee beans tumbling inside a drum roaster, visible through a small window or scoop. Golden-brown color mid-roast. Warm, industrial lighting. Close-up, textural. Third-wave coffee aesthetic.
Barista's hands adjusting a coffee grinder. Close-up of the dial and coffee grounds falling. Focused, precise. Clean counter, morning light. The craft of calibration. Third-wave coffee aesthetic.

A barista handing a finished latte across the counter to a customer's waiting hands. Warm exchange, both people slightly visible. Natural light, welcoming. The human moment. Third-wave coffee aesthetic.

Man in his early 30s, East Asian features, short black hair. Wearing a dark apron over a plain t-shirt. Warm, genuine smile. Coffee shop background in soft focus. Natural lighting. Head and shoulders portrait, square crop. Editorial portrait photography.

Woman in her late 20s, Latina, dark hair pulled back. Wearing a dark apron. Confident, friendly expression. Behind a coffee counter in soft focus. Natural light. Head and shoulders portrait, square crop. Editorial portrait photography.

Man in his late 20s, dark skin, short natural hair. Wearing chef whites or a dark apron, flour-dusted. Warm smile, slightly playful. Kitchen or pastry station in soft focus. Head and shoulders portrait, square crop. Editorial portrait photography.

Woman in her early 30s, Nordic features, light hair, glasses. Wearing a casual sweater or flannel. Thoughtful expression, slight smile. Coffee cupping table or bags of green coffee in soft focus. Head and shoulders portrait, square crop. Editorial portrait photography.
